sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slipping
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking from a carpeted area to a tile floor when the employee slipped and fell onto the tile floor, suffering shoulder, knee, nose, and mouth injuries that required hospitalization.
An employee was in a stockroom, looking on a shelf for a pair of shoes for a customer. He fell to the floor, suffering a laceration to his head and fractures to a rib and his shoulder.

sampleRecords.part_of_body: Chest, except internal location of diseases or disorders
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to tripping on uneven surface
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking to her car in the parking lot at the end of her shift. She tripped on an uneven surface and fell breaking a rib.
An employee broke their leg while fixing a ceiling.

topHazards.label: The candleholders can tip over, posing a fire and burn hazard to consumers.

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC, Bloomingdale's By Mail Announce Recall of Candleholders
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled candleholders are shaped like a tree, made of metal, and gold in color. The tree is about 24 inches tall and 15 inches wide and contains six metal hooks and glass cups for placing votive candles. The candleholders have a style number of 3562745.
hazards: The candleholders can tip over, posing a fire and burn hazard to consumers.
injuries: The firm has received two reports involving concerns with the candleholder's stability, though no injuries have been reported.
